title: Oven Glove Thicken Silicone Pot Holder Mini Oven Mitt Heat Resistant Pinch Covers for Air Fryer, Baking, Cooking, Bbq Grilling (Grey)
features: Premium quality - Oven gloves are made of food grade silicone material and are safe to use,This material is durable and not easily torn.
Antiskid design-Secure nonslip grip is ideal for handling hot plates and small pans. Mouth allows for a perfect grip with baking dishes, pans, toaster oven or conventional oven racks.
Multipurpose - The oven mitts can be heat and cold resistant and can be used in ovens, hot pots, pans, etc. It can prevent you and your family from getting burn, frostbite or soiling.

Handy to use and hung - The small oven mitts are very convenient to use. It can be easily hung on the oven door handle or hook. Oven mitts can be nested inside each other for storage without taking up space in the kitchen.

Machine washable - The oven mitts are very easy to clean. It can be washed in the dishwasher.It's not as big as a glove. It can only cover your fingers. It's suitable for small hands. Use oven gloves carefully to avoid scalding your hands or fingers.
description: Product feature : This oven mitts are waterproof and extremely heat resistant, preventing you and your family's hands from being burnt, frostbitten or soiled. It can be used in microwave ovens, hot pots or hot plates. This oven mitts have a special design. There is a hole in the middle of the mitts that is easy to hang. Does not take up your kitchen space. Premium quality : Made from food-grade silicone , this oven mitts are safe to use. This material can not only be washed in the dishwasher, but it is also non-slip. You and your family can use it with confidence. NOTE: The oven mitts are not fully covered, it can only cover the fingers. Therefore, please be careful when using it. Do not let your hands touch hot or cold places to prevent your hands from being burnt or frostbite. Package includes: 2 x oven mitts
